name: Zesty Pineapple Relish
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Minced fresh red chili pepper
recipeInstructions:
Sweet pineapple is enlivened by fresh, crisp cucumber spiced up with garlic, chilies, and tangy lime juice. The heat of the chili comes from the seeds and ribs, so remove them before mincing (wear rubber gloves).
1. Combine diced pineapple, cucumber, and onion in a bowl. Mix gently.
2. Toss in minced chili, garlic, lime zest, and lime juice. Cover and refrigerate up to 2 hours before use.
3. Add basil and cilantro just before serving. Serve chilled.
Yield: 2 cups. Per 1/4 cup serving: 24 calories, 0.2 grams fat, no cholesterol.
